title: Seed 5-10 exemplar Ewing models (fully sourced + re-id reviewed)
context: The seed set proves the schema, provenance model, and re-id gate end-to-end on a small set of exemplar Ewing models drawn only from unambiguously-open sources before any breadth ingestion (PLAN M0). Depends on the schema, license register, provenance model, and re-id lint (001-004). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Curate 5-10 exemplar Ewing sarcoma models as schema-valid datasheets, every field provenance-stamped and license-cleared, passing second-curator and re-id review.
acceptanceCriteria: 5-10 Ewing models from unambiguously-open sources, every field provenance-stamped + license-cleared.
Second-curator review + domain spot-check + re-id sign-off complete.
output: output/seed/ exemplar datasheets (5-10 models) with provenance records, validating against the v0.1 schema.
